title: Plum Crumble with Citrus Zest
description: A sweet Chinese-inspired dessert featuring plums in a crispy crumble topping.
instructions: Wash and slice the plums, then soak in a mixture of Greek yogurt and citrus zest for 30 minutes.
In a separate bowl, mix crumble mixture with jam until well combined.
Transfer plum slices to a baking dish and top with crumble mixture.
Sprinkle cornstarch over crumble mixture to prevent soggy topping.
Bake for 25-30 minutes or until crumble topping is golden brown.
Serve warm with additional Greek yogurt if desired.
